{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54779", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-294", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Capture-replay"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-613", "name": "Insufficient Session Expiration"}], "description": "### Impact
When enabling DetectReplayedTokens, a token can be replayed and will be detected despite it being reused.

### Patches
Fixed in CoreWCF v1.8.1 and v1.9.1

### Workarounds
Provide your own implementation of `ITokenReplayCache` with the correct behavior.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00268, "percentile": 0.18512}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9jr3-rj99-8jq3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jr3-rj99-8jq3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9jr3-rj99-8jq3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54779"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security/advisories/GHSA-9jr3-rj99-8jq3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jr3-rj99-8jq3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security-advisories/GHSA-9jr3-rj99-8jq3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF", "summary": "CoreWCF: SAML token replay protection is inoperative", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jr3-rj99-8jq3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.Primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.8.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.Primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.9.0, < 1.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CoreWCF: SAML token replay protection is inoperative
